description: Create a vertical digital signage presentation for a travel agency window display. The presentation must use a portrait orientation (e.g., 9:16 aspect ratio) and consist of four slides using images from /home/ga/Documents/Assets/Cities/ (new_york.jpg, paris.jpg, tokyo.jpg, and london.jpg). On each slide, the image must cover the entire background with the corresponding city name as a large, visible text overlay. Configure the slideshow to advance automatically every 3 seconds and loop continuously. Save the final presentation to /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/vertical_signage.odp.
